name: vantanova-agency-platform
description: Production-ready full-stack website for a premium digital media and marketing agency.

scripts.dev: npm run build -w packages/shared && concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w apps/web && npm run lint -w apps/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w packages/shared && npm run typecheck -w apps/api && npm run typecheck -w apps/web
